reviews.comment:
Fui a hacer el control de batería. Excelente la prueba y el asesoramiento del experto. Faltaría alguien que reciba a los clientes para orientarlos hacia el sector adecuado. Pero es bueno, el ACA cumple.

(Translated by Google)
I went to get my battery checked. The test and the expert advice were excellent. They need someone to greet customers and direct them to the appropriate department. But it's good; the ACA does its job.
